AIPrompts.overview:
Generate a clean Markdown solution overview using ONLY the uploaded solution chunks.
You MUST consult: overview.json, canvasapps.json + canvasapps_detailed.json, workflows.json + workflows_detailed.json, envvars.json, relationships.json.
Rules: If a field exists in those files, you MUST use it. Only say 'Not found in uploaded files.' if the relevant file truly lacks that data. Keep headings and bullet points, client-readable.
Naming rules: Workflows with GUID suffix display as CleanName (FullName). Environment variables: FriendlyName (Key).
Include: 1) Plain-English overview 2) Counts 3) Canvas Apps section 4) Workflows section 5) Environment variables list.
AIPrompts.workflows: Summarise each workflow in Markdown using ONLY the uploaded chunks. You MUST consult workflows_detailed.json and relationships.json (screen_to_workflow). For each workflow include: name, trigger, purpose, actions detected, connectors, env vars, invoked from screens. DO NOT invent data. If empty write: Not found in uploaded files.
AIPrompts.faq: Create a Markdown FAQ for the solution using ONLY the uploaded chunks. Include ~10 Q&As. If info is missing, say 'Not found in uploaded files.' Keep it concise.
AIPrompts.diagrams: Output ONLY ONE Mermaid diagram (flowchart LR). Include Canvas Apps, Workflows, Environment Variables as nodes. Naming: CleanName (FullName) for workflows; FriendlyName (Key) for env vars. Connections: Canvas Apps to Workflows, Workflows to env hub, hub to each env var. Subgraphs: CanvasApps, Workflows, EnvironmentVariables. Output ONLY valid Mermaid code, no markdown fences.
AIPrompts.erd: Output ONLY ONE Mermaid diagram (flowchart LR). Consult relationships.json, workflows_detailed.json, canvasapps_detailed.json, envvars.json. Use ONLY real edges: app_to_screen, screen_to_workflow, workflow_to_env, workflow_to_connector, app_to_connector. Naming: CleanName (FullName); FriendlyName (Key). Output ONLY valid Mermaid code, no markdown fences.
AIPrompts.screen-mapping: Create a Markdown table using ONLY relationships.json and workflows_detailed.json. Produce SCREEN -> WORKFLOW mapping for type == screen_to_workflow. Table columns: Screen | Workflow | Trigger | Purpose | ActionsDetected | EvidenceFile | EvidenceSnippet. Strip screen:/workflow: prefixes. If zero items output: Not found in uploaded files.
AIPrompts.environment-variables: Create a JSON array for environment variables with fields: Name, Type, Description, DevValue, TestValue, ProductionValue. Use brief text from uploaded chunks. Use null for missing fields. Output only the JSON array.
